Index.title: Aqina Premium Chicken Essence
Index.subtitle: Pure extraction, crafted for modern recovery and daily resilience

hero.title: No Water Added.
hero.description: From pineapple-fed farm chickens to small-molecule extraction, each pouch is built for clean taste, quick absorption, and a premium daily ritual that feels effortless.

audience.subtitle: Tailored Nourishment
audience.title: A premium ritual for every season of life

workplace.title: Sharper mornings, cleaner focus, no heavy aftertaste.
workplace.description: Built for long office hours and early starts, Aqina delivers a brighter, soup-like profile with fast absorption so your first drink supports clarity instead of feeling medicinal.
workplace.pointOne: Light golden taste that is easy to drink daily
workplace.pointTwo: Small-molecule nutrition for quick morning recovery
workplace.pointThree: Fits executives, founders, and high-output teams

maternity.title: Gentle enough for sensitive days, rich enough for deep nourishment.
maternity.description: Designed for pregnancy and postpartum recovery, the formula keeps the aroma clean and the texture light while still delivering concentrated amino acids for everyday restoration.
maternity.pointOne: Smoother aroma for sensitive pregnancy stages
maternity.pointThree: A refined ritual for postpartum rebuilding

recovery.title: A concentrated daily backup when the body needs rebuilding.
recovery.description: When appetite is low and recovery demands are high, the goal is purity and absorption. Aqina keeps the serving compact, precise, and easier for daily intake during fragile periods.
recovery.pointOne: Compact serving for low-appetite recovery periods
recovery.pointTwo: Made for surgical recovery and elderly care routines
recovery.pointThree: Clean ingredient story for family confidence

halal.title: Global trust marks, premium process, and a cleaner ingredient story.
halal.description: Halal confidence, disciplined production, and clear sourcing make Aqina easier to recommend to families who want premium nourishment without compromise.
halal.pointOne: Halal-friendly positioning for broader household trust
halal.pointTwo: Premium process story suitable for gifting and sharing
halal.pointThree: Supports modern wellness without changing routines

products.title: Choose your dedicated nourishment plan
products.subtitle: Four high-conviction packs for daily upkeep, targeted recovery, and family replenishment.
products.detailFallbackOne: Premium extraction with no added water
products.detailFallbackTwo: Built for a cleaner, easier daily routine

pack1: A practical first box for everyday nourishment
Clean-tasting daily ritual with low commitment
pack2: Our strongest balance of value and consistency
Enough volume to feel a routine take shape
Best fit for repeat office and home use
pack4: Structured pack for focused recovery windows
Built for households planning a full recovery month
pack6: Highest reserve for long-cycle household use
Suitable for gifting, sharing, and elder support
Best unit economics across the full lineup

form.title: Complete Your Order
form.name: Name / 姓名
form.terms: By clicking confirm, your order is submitted. Payment will be handled via Shopee or PayNow/PayLah!. Returns accepted within 7 days for quality issues.

success.title: Order Received!
success.subtitle: Thank you for your order. Please complete payment using one of the methods below.

payment.title: Payment Instructions
payment.cn: 下单后，请点击下方按钮跳转至 Shopee 完成支付。若选择 PayLah! / PayNow，请扫描下方 QR Code 并备注您的订单号。支付成功后请截图发送至 WhatsApp 客服，我们将立即为您安排发货。
payment.en: After placing your order, please click the button below to complete payment on Shopee. For PayLah! / PayNow, please scan the QR Code below and include your Order ID in the reference. Please send a screenshot of your successful payment to our WhatsApp support for immediate delivery arrangement.
payment.qrUnavailable: PayNow QR details will be shared after order confirmation.
payment.whatsapp: Send payment screenshot to WhatsApp {phone} for faster processing

Science.subtitle: Science and Trust
Science.title: Pure process, global certification, premium peace of mind
Science.description: Every pouch is positioned around cleaner extraction, clearer sourcing, and confidence-building certifications that support both self-use and gifting.

certifications.mygapDesc: Good Agricultural Practices from source to process
certifications.organicDesc: A cleaner ingredient story with modern assurance
certifications.halalDesc: Broader household trust across diverse consumers

nutrition.title: Built for absorption, not heaviness
nutrition.description: Aqina focuses on concentrated essence, clean taste, and small-molecule support so it fits demanding schedules, sensitive recovery periods, and premium wellness routines without burden.

footer.tagline: Premium chicken essence designed for modern families, disciplined recovery, and daily resilience.
